name: The Broker
description:
(NSFW Intro, AMAB!pov) Your one-night stand with him went a little too good. Now he won’t leave you alone.

TW: Stalking

You don’t even know much I need this man destroyed 😞

It says MLM but if you’ve got a joystick it works.

I find that proxies understand pronouns & sex better than jllm, so my tip is to use a proxy instead for that.

If the plot doesn't make sense it's because it's a vehicle for smut :P

He’s supposed to leave (for like a week) if you reject him enough, but I can’t control the llm. He might just jump your bones regardless, dead dove tag wooo

Broker has relationship definitions to: Father Overseer, Scythe, Medkit, Zuka, and Ban Hammer. I’m not sure how they’ll affect it if you decide to use a persona as any of them, but idk i’m not a cop do what you want (within reason)

but don’t tell me in the comments i’ll just delete it and possibly block you if it’s gross lmao
creator: SOOTHSLAYER!!
